heroHeadline: UN Decade on Ecosystem Restoration: Midpoint — 300M Hectares Under Restoration
heroSubtitle: Global pledges exceed 215 million ha under the Bonn Challenge as Amazon deforestation falls 50%; the Great Green Wall reaches 18% completion with a 96% delivery gap vs. targets.
footerNote: Data sourced from UNEP, FAO, UNCCD, IUCN, WRI Global Forest Watch, and Tier 2 science outlets. Pledge figures reflect commitments; verified restoration is substantially lower.
